g.text: The L4 Load Balancer Trap -- why gRPC pins to one pod
HTTP/2 multiplexes thousands of calls over one TCP connection. L4 LBs distribute connections, not requests.
1 long-lived HTTP/2 connection. LB picks one pod for the connection. Every request on that stream pins there.
ALL requests pinned to ONE pod
Add capacity = still one hot pod
L7 (HTTP/2-aware) proxy OR client-side LB OR service mesh xDS -- the fix
Terminates HTTP/2 stream and distributes each request across all healthy pods.
